meta.siteTitle: Ubepari Wallet — Own your dream PC. Pay in parts.
meta.siteDescription: Tanzania's premium hire-purchase platform for PCs. Pay a deposit via M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, or card — walk out with your machine today.

footer.copyright: © {year} Ubepari PC. Built in Dar es Salaam.
footer.legalNote: Credit facility operated by Ubepari PC. Hire-purchase regulated under Tanzanian consumer-finance law.

hero.badge: New — Own your dream PC in 3 taps
hero.subheading: The premium way to buy a PC in Tanzania. Choose your machine, pay a deposit, and walk out with it today — everything else lives in your Ubepari Wallet.

howItWorks.heading: Three taps. That's it.
howItWorks.body: We designed Ubepari so the distance between wanting a PC and owning it is as short as possible — without making you read a contract you'll never read.

steps.title: Verify once.
steps.body: Upload your NIDA or passport. Our KYC team approves you — usually within a few hours — and you get your credit limit.

steps.title: Pick your PC.
steps.body: Browse the store or tell our AI Tech Tips what you need. Slide to see monthly plans over 3, 6, 9, or 12 months.

steps.title: Pay and own it.
steps.body: 20% deposit via M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, or card. Walk out with the PC. Pay the rest from your Wallet.

aiCta.body: "I'm a graphic designer who edits 4K video and occasionally plays Valorant with friends. Budget's around 4M." That's all it needs.

chat.userMessage: I design book covers in Photoshop and want to start freelancing video edits. Budget around 3.5M.
chat.aiPrefix: For your use case I'd go with the
chat.aiSuffix: . 3.5K OLED is a gift for retouching, and the RTX 4060 handles Premiere timelines smoothly.

items.title: NIDA-verified
items.body: Every customer is verified through Tanzania's National ID system.

items.title: Encrypted payments
items.body: M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, and card — all via Evmark's certified gateway.

items.title: Same-day pickup
items.body: Pay your deposit and collect your PC from our Dar showroom today.

items.title: WhatsApp support
items.body: A real person on the other end. Your order ID is pre-filled.
